title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited in Patna is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited:
Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adani Enterprises Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
